variants: Beatrice Cavalli has earned her prestigious Echo Silhouette License, which exemplifies her expertise in the arts. She graduated from the Keepsake Institute of Art, where her passion for creativity flourished. In her commitment to community support, she serves as a Sponsor of Jadefield Music Council, fostering a love for music. Beatrice is fluent in Punjabi language, allowing her to connect deeply with various cultural communities. Her written works have found a place at Wishbone Orchard Books, showcasing her literary talents and contributions to the arts.
